head.title: Users
head.subtitleAdmin: {{count}} members · Manage the people in your organization

toolbar.searchPlaceholder: Search by name, username, or email…

empty.title: No users found
empty.descSearch: No users match your search. Try a different name or email.
empty.descAdmin: Invite your first teammate to get started.
empty.descMember: There are no other users in your organization yet.

actions.deleteSelfTitle: You can't delete your own account

inviteModal.title: Invite user
inviteModal.hint: The invited user will receive a setup link and must create their account on their own device (generating a GPG key pair) before they can sign in. The private key never touches the server.

editModal.title: Edit user
editModal.disableHint: Disabled users keep their data but can no longer sign in.

deleteDialog.title: Delete user
deleteDialog.checking: Checking whether this user can be deleted…
deleteDialog.confirmPrefix: Are you sure you want to permanently delete
deleteDialog.confirmSuffix: ? This cannot be undone, and their access will be revoked immediately.

toast.inviteSent: Invite sent. They must complete account setup via email before they can sign in.

error.load: Failed to load the user directory.
error.inviteForbidden: You don't have permission to invite users.
error.editForbidden: You don't have permission to edit this user.
error.deleteForbidden: You don't have permission to delete this user.
error.deleteBlocked: This user can't be deleted right now — they are the sole owner of some shared passwords, or the only manager of a group. Please transfer ownership first.
error.deleteFailed: Failed to delete the user. They may be the sole owner of some content; transfer ownership first.

emptyList.title: No groups yet
emptyList.descAdmin: Create a group to share passwords with a set of users at once.
emptyList.descMember: You aren't a member of any group yet.

selectPrompt.title: Select a group
selectPrompt.desc: Pick a group on the left to view its members.

detail.emptyDescManage: Add users to this group to start sharing.
detail.emptyDescMember: This group has no members yet.

createModal.title: New group
createModal.hint: You'll be the group's first manager. You can add more members from the group detail view.

manageModal.title: Manage members · {{name}}
manageModal.reencrypting: Re-encrypting group secrets for new members…
manageModal.reencryptHint: {{progress}} · Private keys never leave each device
manageModal.searchPlaceholder: Search users by name or username
manageModal.noKeyTitle: This user hasn't finished account setup yet
manageModal.pendingRemovals: {{count}} member(s) will be removed when you save.
manageModal.footnote: New members automatically receive a re-encrypted copy of every secret this group can access. Keep your vault unlocked while saving.

deleteDialog.title: Delete "{{name}}"?
deleteDialog.checking: Checking whether this group can be safely deleted…
deleteDialog.blockedIntro: This group can't be deleted because it is the sole owner of the following passwords. Transfer ownership first, then try again:
deleteDialog.warning: Deleting this group removes it for all members and revokes the shared-password access it granted. This cannot be undone.

error.forbidden: You do not have permission to perform this action.
error.vaultLocked: Your vault is locked. Unlock with your passphrase before adding members — new members need their secrets re-encrypted.
error.cannotAddMembers: Cannot add {{names}}: no public key is available, so their secrets cannot be encrypted. They must finish account setup first. No changes were made.
error.missingOperatorSecret: The server did not provide your own secret for resource {{resourceId}}, so it cannot be re-encrypted for the new member. No changes were made.
error.recipientKeyMissing: A recipient key went missing during encryption. No changes were made.
error.deleteCheck: Cannot delete this group right now.
